svg.aria-label: Fast animated world map with cumulative purple regional highlights and client dots
svg.title: Fast animated global client map
svg.desc: White-water world map with light-gray countries, cumulative purple highlights, and light-purple client dots popping up over the United States, Canada, Mexico, Europe, Asia, and Australia.
